name: QueryBuilder
description: Visual AND/OR predicate-tree builder; serializes to JSON or a LINQ predicate.

api.name: QueryBuilder
api.description: Visual AND/OR predicate-tree builder; serializes to JSON or a LINQ predicate.

parameters.name: Fields
parameters.description: The fields the consumer can build conditions against. Required.

parameters.name: Query
parameters.description: The query tree. Two-way bindable via @bind-Query. When null on first render, an empty root group (And, no rules) is created.

parameters.name: QueryChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the query tree changes (rule/group added, removed, or edited). Also fires once on first render for an uncontrolled (initially-null) builder to publish the auto-seeded empty root group.

parameters.name: ShowJsonPreview
parameters.description: When true, renders a read-only JSON view of the query below the builder.

parameters.name: MaxDepth
parameters.description: Maximum group nesting depth. The "Add group" button is disabled at this depth.

parameters.name: AllowEmptyGroups
parameters.description: When false, "Remove rule" / "Remove group" are hidden when it would leave a group empty (the root may always be empty).

parameters.name: ValueEditorTemplate
parameters.description: Optional override for how a rule's value editor renders. Receives the rule. When supplied, replaces the built-in per-type editor entirely (the consumer is then responsible for binding to Value and calling NotifyChanged via the cascaded context — see docs).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element.

events.name: QueryChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the query tree changes (rule/group added, removed, or edited). Also fires once on first render for an uncontrolled (initially-null) builder to publish the auto-seeded empty root group.

records.name: QueryBuilderContext
records.signature:
QueryBuilderContext(
        IReadOnlyList<QueryField> Fields,
        int MaxDepth,
        bool AllowEmptyGroups,
        RenderFragment<QueryRule>? ValueEditorTemplate,
        Func<Task> NotifyChanged)
records.description: Cascaded state shared with the recursive QueryBuilderGroup renderer.

examples.title: Basic builder
examples.code:
<QueryBuilder Fields="_fields" @bind-Query="_query" />

@code {
    private readonly IReadOnlyList<QueryField> _fields = new List<QueryField>
    {
        new() { Name = "name", Label = "Name", Type = QueryFieldType.Text },
        new() { Name = "age", Label = "Age", Type = QueryFieldType.Number },
        new() { Name = "isActive", Label = "Active", Type = QueryFieldType.Boolean },
        new() { Name = "plan", Label = "Plan", Type = QueryFieldType.Select,
                Options = new[] { ("free", "Free"), ("pro", "Pro") } }
    };

    private QueryGroup _query = QueryGroup.CreateEmpty();
}

examples.title: With JSON preview
examples.code:
<QueryBuilder Fields="_fields" @bind-Query="_query" ShowJsonPreview="true" />

@code {
    // ShowJsonPreview renders the live System.Text.Json shape — handy for
    // showing the consumer exactly what would be sent to a backend, or for debugging.
    // Programmatically: var json = QueryBuilder.ToJson(_query);
    //                   var back = QueryBuilder.FromJson(json);
}

examples.title: Pre-populated nested groups
examples.code:
<QueryBuilder Fields="_fields" @bind-Query="_query" MaxDepth="3" />

@code {
    private QueryGroup _query = new()
    {
        Combinator = QueryCombinator.And,
        Rules =
        {
            new QueryRule { Field = "isActive", Operator = "=", Value = true },
            new QueryGroup
            {
                Combinator = QueryCombinator.Or,
                Rules =
                {
                    new QueryRule { Field = "plan", Operator = "=", Value = "pro" },
                    new QueryRule { Field = "plan", Operator = "=", Value = "enterprise" }
                }
            }
        }
    };

    // Run it client-side:
    // var predicate = QueryBuilder.ToExpression<Customer>(_query);
    // var matches = customers.Where(predicate.Compile());
}

parameters.name: Group
parameters.description: The group node this instance renders — its combinator, rules, and nested groups.

parameters.name: Depth
parameters.description: Nesting depth of this group (0 for the root). Drives the visual indent and gates "Add group" against MaxDepth.

parameters.name: Parent
parameters.description: The parent group (null for the root) — used to support self-removal.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root group element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root group element.

slots.name: ValueEditorTemplate
slots.description: Optional override for how a rule's value editor renders. Receives the rule. When supplied, replaces the built-in per-type editor entirely (the consumer is then responsible for binding to Value and calling NotifyChanged via the cascaded context — see docs).

mdSummary:
# QueryBuilder

Visual AND/OR predicate-tree builder; serializes to JSON or a LINQ predicate.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/query-builder

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| QueryBuilder | Fields | `IReadOnlyList<QueryField>` | `Array.Empty<QueryField>()` | The fields the consumer can build conditions against. Required. |
| QueryBuilder | Query | `QueryGroup?` | `` | The query tree. Two-way bindable via @bind-Query. When null on first render, an empty root group (And, no rules) is created. |
| QueryBuilder | QueryChanged | `EventCallback<QueryGroup>` | `` | Raised whenever the query tree changes (rule/group added, removed, or edited). Also fires once on first render for an uncontrolled (initially-null) builder to publish the auto-seeded empty root group. |
| QueryBuilder | ShowJsonPreview | `bool` | `false` | When true, renders a read-only JSON view of the query below the builder. |
| QueryBuilder | MaxDepth | `int` | `5` | Maximum group nesting depth. The "Add group" button is disabled at this depth. |
| QueryBuilder | AllowEmptyGroups | `bool` | `true` | When false, "Remove rule" / "Remove group" are hidden when it would leave a group empty (the root may always be empty). |
| QueryBuilder | ValueEditorTemplate | `RenderFragment<QueryRule>?` | `` | Optional override for how a rule's value editor renders. Receives the rule. When supplied, replaces the built-in per-type editor entirely (the consumer is then responsible for binding to Value and calling NotifyChanged via the cascaded context — see docs). |
| QueryBuilder | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element. |
| QueryBuilder | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element. |
| QueryBuilderGroup | Ctx | `QueryBuilder.QueryBuilderContext` | `default!` |  |
| QueryBuilderGroup | Group | `QueryGroup` | `default!` | The group node this instance renders — its combinator, rules, and nested groups. |
| QueryBuilderGroup | Depth | `int` | `0` | Nesting depth of this group (0 for the root). Drives the visual indent and gates "Add group" against MaxDepth. |
| QueryBuilderGroup | Parent | `QueryGroup?` | `` | The parent group (null for the root) — used to support self-removal. |
| QueryBuilderGroup | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root group element. |
| QueryBuilderGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root group element. |

## Slots
- `ValueEditorTemplate` (QueryBuilder) — Optional override for how a rule's value editor renders. Receives the rule. When supplied, replaces the built-in per-type editor entirely (the consumer is then responsible for binding to Value and calling NotifyChanged via the cascaded context — see docs).

## Events
- `QueryChanged` (`EventCallback<QueryGroup>`) — Raised whenever the query tree changes (rule/group added, removed, or edited). Also fires once on first render for an uncontrolled (initially-null) builder to publish the auto-seeded empty root group.

## Sub-components
- `QueryBuilderGroup`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Ctx` (`QueryBuilder.QueryBuilderContext`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ArrowDown` — HandleCombinatorKeyDown handles ArrowDown in QueryBuilderGroup.razor
- `ArrowRight` — HandleCombinatorKeyDown handles ArrowRight in QueryBuilderGroup.razor
- `ArrowUp` — HandleCombinatorKeyDown handles ArrowUp in QueryBuilderGroup.razor
- `ArrowLeft` — HandleCombinatorKeyDown handles ArrowLeft in QueryBuilderGroup.razor
- `Home` — HandleCombinatorKeyDown handles Home in QueryBuilderGroup.razor
- `End` — HandleCombinatorKeyDown handles End in QueryBuilderGroup.razor

## Example
```razor
<QueryBuilder />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/QueryBuilder/QueryBuilder.razor`
- `UI/QueryBuilder/QueryBuilderGroup.razor`
- `UI/QueryBuilder/QueryBuilderModel.cs`
